bead.title: interim: hide niche ddx agent subcommands (benchmark, condense, capabilities, replay) until full retirement
bead.description:
Per audit B6 (optional): if the full ddx agent retirement (sibling bead) takes long, hide the niche subcommands (ddx agent benchmark, condense, capabilities, replay) in the interim by setting Cobra Hidden:true. Reduces operator surprise.

If the full retirement bead lands soon, this bead is moot — close as superseded.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/cmd/agent_*.go subcommands for benchmark, condense, capabilities, replay set Hidden: true. 2. ddx agent --help no longer lists them. 3. They still work if invoked explicitly (not removed, just hidden). 4. cd cli && go build ./... green.
